'''Frap Radicon''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who helped [[Bevel Lemelisk]] design the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]. Following one of Lemelisk's deaths and the destruction of the Death Star over [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], Radicon was involved in a scheme to invent new [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]]. He perished when [[Q-7N]] destroyed [[Malagarr/Legends|Malagarr]].

{{Char-stub}}
